title: Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates:
Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University Asia Pacific Associates!
